DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FEE FOR SERVICE WAS $50.00 REMARKS:PER CURRENT EMPLOYEE, THEY DO NOT ACCEPT LEGAL DOCUMENT AT THIS PROVIDED LOCATION. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIENKIEWICZ, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER (SC-105). #2 FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO PLAINTIFF SIENKIEWICZ, MICHAEL
ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PER JPT WILLIAM LYNN'S ORDER DATED MAY 5, 2025, SMALL CLAIMS COURT LACKS JURISDICTION UNDER CAL. REVENUE AND TAXATION CODE SECTION 5140. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MICHAEL SIENKIEWICZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
ORDER FOR DISMISSAL W/O PREJUDICE RE: COURT LACK JURISDICTION
